mapper.select:
select ro.repair_order_id , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ro.content , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ro.create_time , ro.image_files_resource_key ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM repair_order ro left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ro.repair_order_id , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ro.content , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ro.create_time , ro.image_files_resource_key ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM repair_order ro left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ro.repair_order_id , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ro.content , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ro.create_time , ro.image_files_resource_key ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM repair_order ro left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
where ro.repair_order_id = #{id}
